title: calamagrostis caespitosa
intro: Calamagrostis caespitosa, also known as the tufted fescue, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Calamagrostis caespitosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
